name: Potato Salad with Creamy Caviar Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first three ingredients in a medium bowl until well combined.
2. Fold in 1/4 cup caviar into the mixture. Cover and refrigerate. (Dressing can be prepared up to 2 hours ahead. Keep refrigerated.)
3. Cook potatoes in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender, about 20 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer potatoes to a work surface to cool.
4. Cook beans in the same pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Drain.
5. Rinse beans under cold water to cool them down.
6. Cut beans into 1-inch lengths and cut potatoes into quarters.
7. Combine potatoes, beans, endive, chopped eggs, and green onions in a large bowl.
8. Add dressing and toss gently to coat everything evenly. Season generously with salt and pepper.
9. Divide the salad among four plates and top each portion with about 1 teaspoon of caviar.
